_note: Hand-curated GPS coordinates for works whose subject is a recognizable Maine location. Each entry pairs a work id with a place and the lat/lng of that place. Demonstration data — not authoritative.

pins.note: Winslow Homer painted along the rocks at Prout's Neck for 25 years.
Fitz Henry Lane's luminist view of the harbor.
N. C. Wyeth's fishermen on Islesboro.
Bellows summered on the island in 1916.
Frederic Edwin Church's Hudson River School view of Maine's highest peak.
Signal pitcher made for Portland's signal tower.
